name: Google Workspace
description: Monitor Google Workspace user access, organizational units, and admin activity for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Create or use existing OAuth app in Google Cloud Console > APIs & Services > Credentials
2. Enable Admin SDK Directory API and Reports API
3. Add redirect URI: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
4. Copy Client ID and Secret to Comp AI admin panel
5. Must be authorized by a Google Workspace super admin account

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Google Workspace users, their account status, and 2FA enrollment

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies that Google Workspace organizational units are configured to separate teams and environments
